about: I am a motivated, passionate, and technologically diverse professional seeking a dynamic technical role where I can apply my strategic networking skills to contribute to organizational success. I am driven to enhance network operations and collaborate on innovative solutions that improve network integrity, protect against advanced threats, and ensure regulatory compliance across mission-critical systems.
leadership: With 16 years of experience in the Army, I have developed a leadership style centered on training subordinates, effectively utilizing dynamic technical expertise, employing clear communication, and delivering mission-oriented results. I’ve had the privilege of training personnel on both network-based and non-network-based programs, ensuring that my subordinates, seniors, and peers are equipped with the skills to handle any technical challenge. As a network engineer, I’ve successfully led projects that involved systems integration while maintaining security and compliance with regulatory standards. I understand the importance of teamwork and collaboration, and I take pride in mentoring personnel to foster a learning environment where every team member’s skill, knowledge, and experience are valued. My leadership is rooted in a deep commitment to continuous learning and improving technological mastery, while always striving to meet the needs of the mission and the organization.
communication: I am adept at translating complex technical concepts into clear, actionable insights for diverse audiences, including technical teams, leadership, and non-technical stakeholders. By collaborating closely with cross-functional teams, I ensure security initiatives align with organizational objectives and risk management strategies. I have effectively led training sessions in multiple fields, presented in-depth assessments to executives, and facilitated discussions that drive informed decision-making. My ability to simplify complex topics ensures that all parties are equipped to make proactive and informed decisions.
terminalIntro: [*] Credentials: Google Cybersecurity · SEC+ · CEH Course

experience.role: Communications Architect / Telecommunications Specialist / Electronics Technician
experience.mos: MOS: 25E – Electromagnetic Spectrum Manager, 94E – Radio Equipment Repairer

cyber: Engineered, designed, implemented, and deployed an IP-based pulse emitter radio mesh network system to emulate tactical Army ground force signals, enhancing cyber blue team deception operations.

With authorization, planned and executed “Grey Box” penetration testing.  Acquired access to internal systems with elevated privileges.  Reported findings to network administrators encouraging policy and security changes.

Deployed and managed SIEM (Security Information and Event Management) solutions using CentOS, Nessus, Splunk, and downtrace sensor integration, enhancing network threat detection and incident response capabilities across 4,000+ systems.

Provided Tier-3 network support at the Army Cyber Center Southwest Asia, coordinating high-priority regional issues, conducting root cause analysis, and ensuring mission-critical infrastructure remained in operation. Acted as a liaison between high command and vendors to ensure timely resolution of complex issues.
network: Collaborated with network engineers to deploy and configure remote nodal networks, employing IPS/IDS sensors on edge devices, managed virtual configuration of enterprise-grade operating systems, deployed software-defined radio and other advanced solutions, enhancing system integration, security, and connectivity for remote mission-critical operations.

Diagnosed and resolved network-related software and hardware issues remotely, using advanced troubleshooting techniques to minimize downtime and maintain uptime. Ensured system stability and network performance optimization across environments.

Ensured compliance with host nation radio frequency spectrum regulations, telecommunication standards, and industry standards serving as the network engineer for terrestrial point-to-point systems, collaborating with cross-functional teams to integrate secure communication channels into seamless and encrypted data transmission across multiple countries and environments.

Engineered, optimized, and maintained long-distance point-to-point IP-based communication systems, ensuring secure, reliable, and efficient data transmission across various proprietary platforms. Integrated encryption protocols and network security measures to safeguard critical communication channels.

Engineered, programmed, and managed over 5,000 radio and IP-based communication systems, ensuring seamless connectivity and secure data transmission across global organizational assets. Designed communication infrastructure in compliance with regulatory guidelines and network security protocols.

Diagnosed and repaired hardware equipment to ensure operational efficiency. Leveraged troubleshooting with specialized tools and techniques that align with material management, maintenance, and support.
Performed system testing, calibration, and component repairs to meet technical and operational standards. Ensured functionality and compliance through detailed inspections and adjustments.

Upgraded system hardware and implemented replacements to meet evolving technical requirements. Enhanced system performance and reliability through proactive planning and execution through lifecycle management.
management: Managed and administered Active Directory, overseeing user accounts, role-based access controls, and security policies for 2,000 users. Implemented role-based group policies, two-factor authentication, and network security measures to safeguard against unauthorized access and ensure operational security.

Developed and led training programs on terrestrial network configurations, system architecture integration, and operational usage. Empowered teams with the skills to optimize system performance while maintaining secure communications.

items: Access Control installation & configuration (NFC, PIV, PIN, Biometric)
Unifi/Ubiquiti ecosystem for enterprise-level network management
Designed and deployed VMware WSXi vSphere Hypervisor

Software Defined Radio (SDR) for signal analysis and spoofing

Flipper Zero for testing and enhancing network defense strategies
